title: TIP-1.0 Compatibility Declaration
description: How a component declares its TIP version range and peer capability requirements. Phase 1 stub; rule engine lands in Phase 3.

tip_version_range.description: Version range the component can speak, e.g. '>=TIP-1.0,<TIP-2.0'.

requires_peer_capabilities.description: Capability labels the peer MUST publish for the connection to succeed.
